title: Vegan Dutch-Style Carnaroli Rice Pilaf
description: A flavorful and comforting vegan rice pilaf recipe with a Dutch twist, featuring Carnaroli rice and a blend of aromatic spices.

ingredients.name: mildly flavored oil
ingredients.notes: Can be substituted with vegan butter or oil

instructions: Heat the mildly flavored oil in a large saucepan over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and sauté until translucent, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the chopped carrots and sauté for another 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and sauté for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the Carnaroli rice and stir to coat the rice in oil and mix with vegetables.
Add the briny vegetable broth and Dutch spices, and bring to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low, cover, and simmer for 15-20 minutes, or until the rice is cooked and the liquid is absorbed.
Garnish with chopped fresh parsley, if desired.
